title: Ore Tweaker
description: Add, remove & tweak ore-generation features using JSON
body:
## Info:
Ore Tweaker is a super lightweight utility mod that allows you to customize and tweak the underground generation in Minecraft using JSON files. The mod can be both installed on a server or a client.

## Tips:
I strongly recommend using World Stripper to debug and test your ore generation alongside this mod.

## JSON:
The ore tweaking is done in the`../config/oretweaker/data/`📂folder
Open the file for the ore you want to tweak `coal_ore.json`📄 or create your own file 📃
![](https://i.imgur.com/CNaCPqa.png)

## Wiki:
Check out the detailed Ore-Tweaker [wiki](https://github.com/EwyBoy/OreTweaker/wiki) for more information! For more help & info join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/eAsSV8dXX2)!
